chosen_action.title: Apollo Cloudflare truthfulness repair
chosen_action.why_now: Apollo was the highest-leverage live lane, but a fresh browser check showed Cloudflare human-verification blocking sequence/list execution while the runtime still marked Apollo as authenticated and available.

result.summary: Patched Apollo readiness detection to treat Cloudflare/Verify-you-are-human interstitials as blocking, reran Apollo monitoring, and updated live status to cloudflare_auth_blocked so the marketer stops choosing a fake executable Apollo lane.
evidence: Fresh Apollo monitor run now reports status=cloudflare_auth_blocked on an authenticated app surface.
Sequences and list-detail pages surfaced a Cloudflare "Verify you are human" blocker during live inspection.
Focused unit tests passed for blocker detection and Apollo readiness gating.

apollo_status_after.notes: Cloudflare interstitial detected in response body from https://app.apollo.io/api/v1/contacts/search?q_contact_fuzzy_name_or_phone=&has_phone=yes&display_mode=fuzzy_select_mode&page=1&per_page=25&call_from_voice_setting_id=&cacheKey=1779746127196. Cloudflare interstitial detected in response body from https://challenges.cloudflare.com/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/h/b/turnstile/f/ov2/av0/rch/3w4jl/0x4AAAAAABI5GqZtId4RpSvo/light/fbE/new/normal?lang=auto. Apollo was already on an authenticated app surface before form automation.
